articles.title: ACSI: Samsung edges out Apple in cell phone satisfaction, while Apple Watch ties at the top - 9to5Mac
articles.description: ACSI has published this year’s Telecommunications, Cell Phone, and Smartwatch Study, and Apple’s results are a bit of a mixed bag.

articles.title: Imaging hidden objects with consumer LiDAR via motion-induced sampling - Nature
articles.description: Researchers enable hidden-object imaging on consumer LiDAR by fusing multiple frames with a motion-based model, achieving three-dimensional reconstruction, tracking and localization using low-cost, off-the-shelf smartphone sensors.

articles.title: De novo design of quasisymmetric two-component protein cages - Nature
articles.description: Researchers designed two-component proteins forming quasisymmetric cages via geometric frustration, enabling tunable virus-like assemblies for cargo delivery, cellular uptake and studying intracellular diffusion and protein localization.

articles.title: ‘Solve all diseases,’ you say? - The Verge
articles.description: In this special Optimizer issue, we contextualize a bold claim by Google DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis during the 2026 I/O keynote.

articles.title: It's not you, would-be Subnautica 2 fish murderers, it's our creature encounters not feeling "fair, readable, and engaging" enough, say Unknown Worlds - Rock Paper Shotgun
articles.description: Subnautica 2's devs have pledged to make creature run-ins "feel fair, readable, and engaging" in an open letter responding to calls for killable fish.

articles.title: Google I/O 2026 had nothing to say and said it badly ahead of Apple's WWDC - AppleInsider
articles.description: Google I/O is always like a little amateur dramatics show, but this year the company could have boasted about making Apple rely on its Gemini. It just totally failed to do so.

articles.title: Google Overhauls Top-Tier AI Plans, Drops Price and Adds YouTube Premium - PCMag
articles.description: A new $100-per-month subscription offers expanded Gemini access for less. The most expensive plan also gets a price cut as Google looks to compete with OpenAI and Anthropic.
